opportunities.name: Google AdSense
opportunities.notes: Apply only after core pages are indexed and content quality is stable.

opportunities.name: Print-ready QR templates
opportunities.notes: Offer free poster, standee and table tent layouts before considering paid templates.

opportunities.name: Affiliate business tools
opportunities.notes: Only promote tools that genuinely help Indian businesses; disclose clearly.

opportunities.name: Sponsored business resources
opportunities.notes: Keep editorial independence and use advertising disclosure.

opportunities.name: Premium dynamic QR later
opportunities.notes: Do not build before static platform has traffic and trust.
